title: Mimi Bunny's Picnic Delivery Dash
description: A polished standalone H5 catch-and-deliver episode bonus game with compact mobile layout, smoother catch timing, fixed final-round delivery and shield transitions, and refined touch feel.

title: Mimi Bubble Pop Parade
description: A standalone mobile-first H5 tap game where Mimi pops matching bubbles to build a parade song for her friends.

title: Mimi Rainbow Hopscotch
description: A standalone mobile-first H5 lane runner where Mimi hops between rainbow lanes, collects charms, dodges clouds, and uses boosts with polished input feel, feedback, effects, and audio.
